calendar.matters:
MOTION For Issuance Of Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Goodman, Esq., 415-781-2266, appeared on behalf of moving party and petitioner Eleazar Garcia. Lyn Harlan, Esq., 510-622-2208, counsel for opposing party and respondent Department of Motor Vehicles.

Counsel for moving party orally requested a statement of decision and also requested a stay depending upon the court's ruling. After argument the matter was taken under submission. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
